summary: PII classifier accuracy — precision >= 0.95 on EN/DE/FR validation set
description_md:
This non-functional requirement ensures the PII auto-tagging classifier meets enterprise-grade accuracy standards for multi-tenant compliance workspaces. High precision is critical to minimize false positives that could block legitimate business data flows while maintaining regulatory compliance.

**Measurable Constraints**:

* **Accuracy**: Precision >= 0.95 and Recall >= 0.90 on the EN/DE/FR validation dataset (minimum 10,000 labeled records per language)
* **Latency**: Classification must complete within 200ms p99 per document (up to 100KB) for real-time connector pipelines
* **Throughput**: Support minimum 500 documents/second per tenant with linear scaling up to 10 concurrent tenants per workspace
* **Availability**: 99.9% uptime for the PII classification service during business hours (06:00-22:00 UTC)
* **Security**: All classification operations must run within VPC-isolated compute with encryption at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3)
